task: Create an IAM policy that allows read-only access to all S3 buckets and objects in the account
solution_criteria: Must include correct IAM policy structure with Version, Statement array, Effect set to Allow, Action containing s3:GetObject and s3:ListBucket, and Resource with appropriate ARN wildcards

task: Write a Python function that extracts the region from an AWS ARN string
solution_criteria: Function should accept an ARN string as parameter, split on colons, return the region (4th element after splitting), and handle edge cases like invalid ARNs

task: Create a regex pattern to validate AWS S3 bucket names according to naming rules
solution_criteria: Pattern must ensure 3-63 characters, start/end with lowercase letter or number, contain only lowercase letters/numbers/hyphens, no consecutive hyphens, and not formatted as IP address
